svg.text: Modern FPGA DNN Inference Accelerator — PS + PL Co-Design with Selective PE Protection
im2col → tile NxN → DMA send ▶ PL
• Load model JSON config at runtime
• Layer tiling plan (based on SA size N)
• Dataset loader: any image folder (SD card)
• Monitor DMR error flags from PL
• Criticality: based on NVF / layer depth
DDR3 Memory (512 MB) — shared PS/PL via AXI HP
A X I I n t e r c o n n e c t & D M A
Parameters: M = N (fixed), D_W = 8-bit INT8 │ AXI-Stream S2MM (input) + MM2S (output) │ Banked BRAM controller
Write M0+M1 → Banked BRAMs │ Fire systolic.sv │ Read M2 results → DMA output │ Done flag
Selective Protection Strategy (based on Neuron Vulnerability Factor — NVF)
TMR: Early rows (high NVF, critical layers)
Bias addition │ ReLU fused │ Layer norm │ Quantization scale (INT8→FP32)
⚙ Build-time configuration via TCL: N (array size) │ D_W (bit-width) │ PE protection_map per (i,j)
Vivado Block Design: Zynq PS7 → AXI Interconnect → AXI DMA (HP0) → mm_axi → systolic.sv
